title: Proxy Server
description: Allows you to connect to servers through a proxy
body:
Client-side mod that allows you to connect to servers through a proxy

- Supports socks4 IPv4 and socks5 IPv4 proxy
- Supports authentication so you can use private proxies

**Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) installed**
 

Here are some usage cases of the mod:
- Hide your IP address from servers
- Testing your server security
